THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIKALOFF, ULYANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HYUNDAI CAPITAL AMERICA $6,225.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,315.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
